purpose: Round-8 (FINAL) locked decision: user's actual transfers/XI/captain/booster for the last round, chosen from the news-adjusted qualification-booster solve; robust across both qualification-rule readings (EV 61.4-63.9, P+15 0.55-0.62)

inputs.market_cap_policy: market weight capped 0.25 in the forecaster; no direct market anchoring in squad EVs

transfers_out.name: Jude Bellingham
transfers_out.why: FIFA ban risk (slap incident) + England rotation + funds

captain_protocol: Mbappe (C) Saturday, vice Messi; if Mbappe returns <=5 raw points in the bronze, move the armband to Messi before Sunday kickoff
booster: Qualification Booster (verify availability + whether its text covers bronze winners; if it does not, prefer Simon over Maignan in goal)

contingencies.dembele_benched: swap Dembele -> Mac Allister before Saturday lock
contingencies.kane_benched: no action needed; 0-minute autosub brings Mac Allister (valid 3-5-2)
contingencies.porro_late_doubt: swap Porro -> Cubarsi any time before Sunday kickoff
